name: partydrivemobileremote
description: Partydrive Mobile Remote — hosts a mobile controller webpage for Partydrive

scripts.build: npm run prebuild && pkg index.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output ../BUILDS/PartydriveMobileRemote.exe --public
scripts.build:linux: npm run prebuild && pkg index.js --targets node18-linux-x64 --output ../BUILDS/Server/PartydriveMobileRemote --public
